title: Identification of Cell Subpopulation-Specific Driver Genes Reveals Ideal Candidates for Renal Cell Carcinoma Immunotherapy.
snippet: With the rapid development of cancer treatment, immunotherapy has revolutionized renal cell carcinoma (RCC) treatment, yet patient responses remain heterogeneous. Here, a computational pipeline was constructed by integrating single-cell and bulk RNA sequencing data to identify immune-related candidate driver genes and characterize their impact on RCC immuno...
